title: Plan the restoration of parks and gardens
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Plan the restoration of parks and gardens demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Carry out preliminary planning activities for restoration works

pcs.text: Discuss and clarify client preferences and requirements for park or garden
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Discuss and clarify client preferences and requirements for park or garden?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Discuss and clarify client preferences and requirements for park or garden.

pcs.text: Assess site for biophysical factors, historical and cultural attributes, services and site modifications
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess site for biophysical factors, historical and cultural attributes, services and site modifications?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess site for biophysical factors, historical and cultural attributes, services and site modifications.

pcs.text: Research legal requirements and local by-laws and restrictions that may affect plan for restoration works
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Research legal requirements and local by-laws and restrictions that may affect plan for restoration works?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Research legal requirements and local by-laws and restrictions that may affect plan for restoration works.

pcs.text: Identify and minimise environmental impact of planned restoration works according to environmental and biosecurity legislation, regulations and workplace procedures, and, if necessary, report to relevant personnel for further research
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and minimise environmental impact of planned restoration works according to environmental and biosecurity legislation, regulations and workplace procedures, and, if necessary, report to relevant personnel for further research?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and minimise environmental impact of planned restoration works according to environmental and biosecurity legislation, regulations and workplace procedures, and, if necessary, report to relevant personnel for further research.

pcs.text: Develop concept plan that reflects client preferences and requirements and takes into account heritage issues, site factors and any identified environmental requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Develop concept plan that reflects client preferences and requirements and takes into account heritage issues, site factors and any identified environmental requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop concept plan that reflects client preferences and requirements and takes into account heritage issues, site factors and any identified environmental requirements.

pcs.text: Present concept plan to client for discussion and approval
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Present concept plan to client for discussion and approval?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Present concept plan to client for discussion and approval.

pcs.text: Consult with other professionals to assist in research and planning of restoration works to meet legislative requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Consult with other professionals to assist in research and planning of restoration works to meet legislative requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Consult with other professionals to assist in research and planning of restoration works to meet legislative requirements.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Carry out preliminary planning activities for restoration works

elements.title: Determine requirements of restoration works

pcs.text: Identify plants appropriate to site, consistent with agreed concept plan and original design philosophy, taking into consideration historical and cultural values
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify plants appropriate to site, consistent with agreed concept plan and original design philosophy, taking into consideration historical and cultural values?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify plants appropriate to site, consistent with agreed concept plan and original design philosophy, taking into consideration historical and cultural values.

pcs.text: Calculate and cost quantity of plants and confirm availability and genetic integrity with suppliers
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Calculate and cost quantity of plants and confirm availability and genetic integrity with suppliers?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Calculate and cost quantity of plants and confirm availability and genetic integrity with suppliers.

pcs.text: Select restoration procedures consistent with agreed concept plan, and account for characteristics of available plant materials, resources and equipment and environmental factors affecting the success of the restoration works
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select restoration procedures consistent with agreed concept plan, and account for characteristics of available plant materials, resources and equipment and environmental factors affecting the success of the restoration works?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select restoration procedures consistent with agreed concept plan, and account for characteristics of available plant materials, resources and equipment and environmental factors affecting the success of the restoration works.

pcs.text: Include maintenance of softscape and hardscape components of park or garden
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Include maintenance of softscape and hardscape components of park or garden?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Include maintenance of softscape and hardscape components of park or garden.

pcs.text: Identify and cost resources, tools, equipment and machinery required for planting and ongoing maintenance of restoration works and confirm availability with suppliers, contractors and appropriate personnel
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and cost resources, tools, equipment and machinery required for planting and ongoing maintenance of restoration works and confirm availability with suppliers, contractors and appropriate personnel?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and cost resources, tools, equipment and machinery required for planting and ongoing maintenance of restoration works and confirm availability with suppliers, contractors and appropriate personnel.

pcs.text: Identify hazards and assess risks associated with work activities, and implement control measures according to workplace health and safety procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify hazards and assess risks associated with work activities, and implement control measures according to workplace health and safety procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify hazards and assess risks associated with work activities, and implement control measures according to workplace health and safety procedures.

pcs.text: Outline staged implementation and development, where appropriate, including providing access for future works as required by client and site requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Outline staged implementation and development, where appropriate, including providing access for future works as required by client and site requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Outline staged implementation and development, where appropriate, including providing access for future works as required by client and site requirements.

pcs.text: Determine timelines for preparations, planting and maintenance, taking into account the needs of restoration species, softscape and hardscape components, site conditions, and other relevant planning requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine timelines for preparations, planting and maintenance, taking into account the needs of restoration species, softscape and hardscape components, site conditions, and other relevant planning requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine timelines for preparations, planting and maintenance, taking into account the needs of restoration species, softscape and hardscape components, site conditions, and other relevant planning requirements.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Determine requirements of restoration works

elements.title: Prepare and document the restoration plan and specifications

pcs.text: Prepare detailed plan, specifications and quotation based on horticultural conventions, original design philosophy and requirements of restoration works, and present to client for acceptance
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare detailed plan, specifications and quotation based on horticultural conventions, original design philosophy and requirements of restoration works, and present to client for acceptance?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare detailed plan, specifications and quotation based on horticultural conventions, original design philosophy and requirements of restoration works, and present to client for acceptance.

pcs.text: Produce scaled site plan which can be readily interpreted and understood by on-site personnel
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Produce scaled site plan which can be readily interpreted and understood by on-site personnel?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Produce scaled site plan which can be readily interpreted and understood by on-site personnel.

pcs.text: Develop and document detailed on-site procedures and schedules required for restoration and ongoing maintenance of park or garden
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Develop and document detailed on-site procedures and schedules required for restoration and ongoing maintenance of park or garden?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop and document detailed on-site procedures and schedules required for restoration and ongoing maintenance of park or garden.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Prepare and document the restoration plan and specifications

evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.title: Position description
evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
